VH. Span of Life 62
Balarista, Yogarista, Short, medium and long
life, Yogas for early death and its time, Yogas
for long and medium lease of life, Dvatrimsad-
yoga, various methods for calculating time of
death. Yogas for infant mortality, illustrative
charts, many Yogaristas, Yogas for number-
less years of life, for becoming a long-lived sage.
VIII. Rasi Effects 82
Effects of birth in the 12 Signs, Effects of planets
occupying exaltation, own, friendly, inimical,
